hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(DROP|TRUNCATE|DELETE FROM|push.*main|push.*release|--no-verify|force-push|-f origin)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive or unsafe git/SQL command detected. Review safety_checklist.md before proceeding.'; exit 1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qiE '(\.env|\.pem|\.key|password=|secret=|api_key=)'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Possible secret or credential in file write. Review before committing.'; exit 1; fi
echo 'File written. Reminder: run tests before raising PR. Check eval_checklist.md for generated code quality checks.'
echo 'Session complete. Before closing: (1) run Jest locally, (2) check SonarQube gate, (3) verify no .env changes staged.'
